title: Before quantum computing arrives, this startup wants enterprises already running on it
why:
- Qutwo is developing an orchestration layer (Qutwo OS) that enables enterprises to shift from classical to quantum computing, supporting both quantum and classical algorithms and chips.
- The company is already working with enterprise customers, such as Zalando and OP Pohjola, to develop quantum-inspired AI tools and joint research initiatives.
- Qutwo is commercially minded and has secured large design partnerships worth tens of millions, co-developing products with enterprise clients in anticipation of quantum computing’s arrival.
- The company's team includes experts from both quantum computing and AI fields, such as the co-founder of IQM and board members from SemiQon and former Silo AI leadership.
- Qutwo is positioning itself to help enterprises benefit from quantum and hybrid computing architectures before practical quantum hardware is widely available, using quantum-inspired solutions on classical hardware now.
